examples:
Command Example
!cylance-protect-get-zones pageNumber=2 pageItems=10
Raw Output
{
"criticality":"High",
"date_created":"2018-03-13T11:38:52",
"date_modified":"2018-03-13T11:38:52",
"id":"f15b2f79-c100-4146-b056-a8005c13b2de",
name: cylance-protect-get-zones

outputs.description: CylanceProtect.Zones.DateCreated Date and time (in UTC) when the zone was created CylanceProtect.Zones.DateModified
outputs.name: High
Date and time (in UTC) when the zone was last modified

outputs.description: CylanceProtect.Zones.PolicyId Unique ID of the policy assigned to the zone CylanceProtect.Zones.UpdateType
outputs.name: Zone name

outputs.description: CylanceProtect.Zones.ZoneRuleId Unique ID for the zone rule created for the zone
outputs.name: Update type for the zone
